form.formComment: At the latest run ran on from midfield and won by 0.8 len at Randwick Kensington 3yo Bm72 March 25 over 1400m on a soft track defeating Just Maz with 56.5kg at $41. The run before that 5th of 10 at Warwick Farm Bm72 on March 11 over 1400m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Hanau carrying 59kg at $21. Won last start and is well-placed again.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 36-day let-up. First-up after nine months favourite; won by 1.3 len at Kembla Grange Bm64 March 3 over 1600m in the wet defeating Exceed Perfection with 59kg at $2.10. Previously second-up 2nd of 7 at Canterbury Super 3yo Mdn on April 30 over 1550m, on rain affected going; long-neck behind Dark Arts carrying 57kg at $4. Fitter and worth including.
